content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks for LLMs can be enhanced by integrating the multiple inconsistent self-perspective core of LLM self-reflection mechanisms, to create a multi-perspective self-refine framework that retains the original advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data. This modified framework can break the single-perspective blind spot that plagues standard Self-Refine, where an LLM cannot catch logical flaws or edge cases it misses in its own initial output.
